channel.title: SPL - Lake City Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Lake City Branch

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. We usually have Spanish speaking tutors available Thursdays 6-7:30pm.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Reduced and Free Transit Fare Enrollment
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Lake City Branch

Low-income individuals and individuals with disabilities can receive a reduced-fare ORCA LIFT transit pass.Individuals receiving TANF, RCA, PWA, SSI, HEN, or ABD can receive a subsidized year-long pass.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. We usually have Spanish speaking tutors available Thursdays 6-7:30pm.

Event details

item.title: KinderArt with Rec’N The Streets
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Join Rec'N The Streets for free art activities!

Event details

item.title: Bilingual Family Story Time / La Hora de Cuentos Familiares Bilingües
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. Program in English and Spanish.-------------------------------------------------------Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en inglés y español. 

Event details

item.title: Homework Help / Ayuda con la tarea
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. We usually have Spanish speaking tutors available Thursdays 6-7:30pm.-------------------------------------------------------------------------Los voluntarios de Ayuda con la tarea estarán en esta sucursal para ayudar a los estudiantes de kínder a 12.º grado con sus tareas escolares durante el año escolar.Usualmente tenemos tutores que hablan español los jueves de 6 a 7:30 p.m

Event details

item.title: 正念太极
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room / 会议室 / 會議室

欢迎参加太极拳课程。太极拳是一种温和、冲击力低的运动，有助于提升身体的平衡能力、柔韧性以及整体协调性。本次活动将以普通话进行。

Event details

item.title: Arabic Story Time / وقت القصص بالعربية
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, children from birth through elementary school and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.Event in English and Arabic.---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------في وقت القصص، يمكن للأطفال الذين تتراوح أعمارهم من حديثي الولادة وحتى سن الخامسة وعائلاتهم الاستمتاع بالقصص والأغاني وأنشطة التعلُّم المرحة.نرحب بالعائلات من جميع الأعمار.يُعقد الحدث باللغة الإنجليزية والعربية

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Lake City Branch

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details

item.title: Adult Arts & Crafts: Gentle Expressions
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a series that combines creative expression with guided reflection to support wellness, self-discovery, and community connection.

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. We usually have Spanish speaking tutors available Thursdays 6-7:30pm.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details
